name: python3-starlette
title: python3-starlette
summary: ASGI library ideal for building high performance asyncio services
description:
ASGI library ideal for building high performance asyncio services
Starlette is a lightweight ASGI (Asynchronous Server Gateway Interface)
framework/toolkit, which is ideal for building high performance asyncio
services.
.
It is production-ready, and gives you the following:
.
* Seriously impressive performance.
* WebSocket support.
* In-process background tasks.
* Startup and shutdown events.
* Test client built on `httpx`.
* CORS, GZip, Static Files, Streaming responses.
* Session and Cookie support.
* 100% test coverage.
* 100% type annotated codebase.
* Zero hard dependencies.
.
Example:
.
from starlette.applications import Starlette
from starlette.responses import JSONResponse
from starlette.routing import Route
.
async def homepage(request):
return JSONResponse({'hello': 'world'})
.
app = Starlette(debug=True, routes=[
Route('/', homepage),
])
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-starlette because ASGI library ideal for building high performance asyncio services.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-starlette as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-starlette with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-starlette --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
